parameter.defaultValue: 1. Filter Events by Status- b app
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 2. Filter Events by Table- b app
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 3. Status filter in events pop up of home page
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 4. table filter in events pop up of home page
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 5. Table main filter in home page and filter out Events Status filter
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 6. Table main filter in home page and filter out Events table filter
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 7. pickup main filter in home page
parameter.name: Text
